/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wformat -Wwrite-strings -Wconversion  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libmaster_board_sdk_pywrap.cpython-38-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o libmaster_board_sdk_pywrap.cpython-38-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk_pywrap.dir/srcpy/my_bindings_headr.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/build/master_board_sdk: libmaster_board_sdk.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_python38.so -lpthread
